run_summary.summary: Big day! 🤝 New inbound from Reach Agency for a Sherwin Williams umbrella spray paint brand (~$10-12k) — Liz already replied positively, ball is in their court to pitch her to the client by EOD Monday. Also: Flexsteel has a TIME-SENSITIVE Popfly campaign application due Monday 4/27 — Kenny forgot to apply after the Steinhafels shoot yesterday, Ian extended the deadline but it's still pressing. And Linkind content was delivered early — Liz uploaded the IG Reel + caption to the Google Drive folder Friday afternoon, ahead of the Mon/Tue deadline.

suggestions.message: Kenny needs to complete the Popfly campaign application TODAY or tomorrow — the deadline is EOD Monday 4/27. Ian from Popfly was gracious enough to extend it, don't let it slip again.

Reach Agency's deadline to pitch Liz's profile to the client is EOD Monday 4/27. If you don't hear back by Tuesday, ping Coreyiel at coreyiel.ellis@reach.agency — she was excited about the partnership.

deals.next_action: Wait for Reach Agency to confirm Liz's profile is pitched to Sherwin Williams brand client
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz replied same day — confirmed free from spray paint exclusivity, rate estimate ~$12k but flexible. Deliverables: 1 TikTok (syndicated to IG Reels + Pinterest), 1 IG Story Set (3 frames), 3 still assets for brand usage. Budget ~$10-12k TBD. Usage: 5 months (Organic/Paid Social, Website, Retailer, Shopper, CRM). Exclusivity: 2 months in spray paint category (paid capacity). Content launch: August 2026. Competitor check: confirm no Home Depot, Behr, or Rust-Oleum partnerships. Agency (Reach, via Coreyiel Ellis) must pitch Liz to brand client by EOD 4/27.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: New inbound from Reach Agency (Coreyiel Ellis) for Sherwin Williams umbrella spray paint brand (~$10-12k). Liz replied same evening confirming interest and exclusivity availability.

deals.next_action: Complete Flexsteel campaign application on Popfly before EOD Monday 4/27
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) extended the Popfly campaign application deadline to Monday 4/27 after Kenny forgot to apply following the Steinhafels content shoot on 4/23. Must complete the platform application by EOD Monday or the window closes.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Ian (Popfly) extended campaign application deadline to Mon 4/27 — Kenny needs to complete the Popfly application before it closes again

deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz delivered content ahead of schedule — uploaded IG Reel + caption to Google Drive folder. Content was originally due Mon/Tue Apr 27-28. Brand had approved concept on Apr 23 requesting lights as the main focus. Content is now with coordinator (Mariah) for submission to brand for review.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Liz uploaded Linkind content to Google Drive ahead of deadline — moved to Approval, waiting on brand review
